step_rationale: Membrane signaling lipid; disturbed during MI reflecting endothelial and cardiomyocyte dysfunction.
mechanism: Phosphatidylinositol phosphate dysmetabolism during MI reflects impaired phosphoinositide signaling and endothelial activation.

references.title: A metabonomic study of cardioprotection of ginsenosides, schizandrin, and ophiopogonin D against acute myocardial infarction in rats.
